title: Tyan
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Tyan-EGTW.jpg]] |name=Tyan |region=*[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Vvan system]] *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Vvan system]] |sector=[[Tyan sector/Legends|Tyan sector]] |system=[[Vvan system]]''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'' |coordinates=K-7 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Entralla Route/Legends|Entralla Route]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] }} {{Quote|Do you know the planet Tyan?''"
"''It's a Mid-Rim planet, I think. Part of the Vvan system. I don't know the Senators there.|Dooku and Eero Iridian|}} '''Tyan''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tyan sector/Legends|Tyan sector]]. By [[76 BBY/Legends|76 BBY]], it was represented in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Galim Eddawan]], whose [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] was captured by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Lorian Nod]], with Eddawan not being seen again afterward. In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], Tyan was a member of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and was the site of a [[Battle of Tyan|battle]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Description== Tyan was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Vvan system]], a part of the [[Tyan sector/Legends|Tyan sector]] in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was situated on the [[Entralla Route/Legends|Entralla Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], which linked it to the [[Ord Tessebok system/Legends|Ord Tessebok system]] in the [[Irishi sector/Legends|Irishi sector]] and the [[Yout system/Legends|Yout system]] of the [[Qiilura sector/Legends|Qiilura sector]]. Another [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route connected Tyan to the [[Osskorn system/Legends|Osskorn system]] as well as the [[Corthenia system/Legends|Corthenia system]] of the [[Corthenia sector/Legends|Corthenia sector]]. ==History== {{Quote|I am Joli Ti Eddawan, daughter of Senator Galim Eddawan of Tyan. The ship is failing. The warning system lights are all blinking. What should I do?|A voice recording by Joli Ti Eddawan|}} By around [[76 BBY/Legends|76 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the section of ''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'' in which Tyan is mentioned to [[76 BBY/Legends|76 BBY]]. [[Galim Eddawan]] served as a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] representing Tyan in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. On the [[Standard day/Legends|day]] that preceded a point during that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Eddawan and his [[Gender/Legends|daughter]] [[Joli Ti Eddawan|Joli Ti]] were scheduled to arrive at the [[Alpha Nonce]] [[Spaceport/Legends|port]] station; however, their [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] was captured by a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] led by the former [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi trainee]] [[Lorian Nod]], with neither the senator nor his daughter ever being seen again.{{CSWECite|I|226|Eddawan, Galim and Joli Ti}} When Joli Ti later mentioned Tyan in a voice recording that Nod used as bait in order to capture Senator [[Blix Annon]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] asked his acquaintance, the [[senatorial aide]] [[Eero Iridian]], for information on the planet. [[12 ABY/Legends|Eighty-eight years]] later, Tyan fell within the borders of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. That year, the [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]] was victorious over the New Republic's [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Lusankya/Legends|''Lusankya'']] in a [[Battle of Tyan|confrontation]] at Tyan as part of the [[Orinda campaign]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Behind the scenes== Tyan was first mentioned in [[Jude Watson]]'s [[2003]] young reader novel ''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]''. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Tyan [[Star system/Legends|system]], and thereby the planet, in grid square K-7. ==Appearances== {{Indexpage}} {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Tyan}} *''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|I||Eddawan, Galim and Joli Ti}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tyan }} [[Category:Galactic Republic planets]] [[Category:Locations along the Entralla Route]] [[Category:New Republic planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Mid Rim]] [[Category:Planets in the New Territories]] [[Category:Tyan sector locations]]
